task_id: 接入DeepSeek固定供应商展示与能力驱动前端
summary: 前端接入 DeepSeek 固定 provider 展示，聊天工具栏改为基于后端 capabilities 字段驱动，不再硬编码 provider === 'zhipu'。保持 Chat.tsx 向后兼容。

modified_files.description: 提供商下拉新增 DeepSeek 选项
ModelOption 接口新增 capabilities 字段；新增 supportsThinking/supportsWebSearch 基于 capabilities.thinking/web_search.supported 计算；保留 supportsZhipuTools 作为向后兼容别名
props 支持 supportsThinking?/supportsWebSearch?（优先）和 supportsZhipuTools?（向后兼容回退）；深度思考和联网搜索按钮各自独立判断能力
getProviderLabel 新增 deepseek → 'DeepSeek' 映射
14 条测试：provider label 展示、capability 驱动按钮状态、image_generation 禁用、无 capabilities 降级、向后兼容

capability_driven_logic.after: supportsThinking = api_type === 'text_generation' && capabilities.thinking.supported; supportsWebSearch = api_type === 'text_generation' && capabilities.web_search.supported
capability_driven_logic.backward_compat: supportsZhipuTools = supportsThinking || supportsWebSearch，Chat.tsx 无需修改

test_commands: npx vitest run src/test/capabilityDrivenToolbar.test.tsx — 14 tests passed
npx vitest run src/test/capabilityDrivenToolbar.test.tsx src/test/chatOptions.test.tsx src/test/chatStreaming.test.tsx src/test/chatThinking.test.ts — 4 files, 26 tests passed
